BBC NewsBBC News - News Front Page https://www.bbc.co.uk/news https://news.bbcimg.co.uk/nol/shared/img/bbc_news_120x60.gif英国广播公司新闻https://www.bbc.co.uk/news节点的 RSS 2026 年 2 月 24 日星期二 08:49:06 GMT Copyright: (C) British Broadcasting Corporation, see https://www.bbc.co.uk/usingthebbc/terms-of-use/#15metadataandrssfeeds for terms and conditions of reuse.en-gb 15
Lord Mandelson released on bail after arrest on suspicion of misconduct in public officeThe Metropolitan Police says a 72-year-old man has been released on bail pending further investigation. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c8xy5jzrrxzo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c8xy5jzrrxzo#0 Tue, 24 Feb 2026 02:25:41 GMT
Russian soldiers tell BBC they saw fellow troops executed on commanders' ordersFour men expose the horror and brutality of conditions in the Ukraine war, with two saying they saw soldiers being shot for refusing orders. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cz7gw3l395ro?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cz7gw3l395ro#0 Tue, 24 Feb 2026 06:02:13 GMT
'Anyone who runs is shot': Watch Russian soldiers describe killings of troops who refuse ordersThe men, who are on the run, told of the horrors they witnessed on the Russian side of the front lines in Ukraine. https://www.bbc.com/news/videos/cx2rql99rwxo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/videos/cx2rql99rwxo#0 Tue, 24 Feb 2026 07:32:54 GMT
Bowen: Why Ukraine remains defiant and does not feel close to defeatThis month marks four gruelling years since the full‑scale invasion began and a genuine ceasefire still feels far from assured https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cd9g2ggq4epo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cd9g2ggq4epo#0 Tue, 24 Feb 2026 06:02:26 GMT
First British baby born using transplanted womb from dead donor Grace Bell, who was born without a viable womb, says her little boy is "simply a miracle". https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cvg53xp5857o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cvg53xp5857o#0 Tue, 24 Feb 2026 00:39:50 GMT
Chocolate kept in anti-theft boxes as retailers warn it's being stolen to orderRetailers and police forces tell the BBC that thieves are targeting chocolate and selling it on. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/ce3gqr7p0lqo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/ce3gqr7p0lqo#0 Tue, 24 Feb 2026 00:07:42 GMT
Victims 'devastated' by train CCTV failures that allow sex offenders to go untracedSex offenders on trains are escaping justice because of serious issues with CCTV on the rail network - BBC investigation. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cwy6746rydro?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cwy6746rydro#0 Tue, 24 Feb 2026 06:01:25 GMT
GPs to get £3,000 bonus to maximise weight loss drug prescriptionsBid to improve access to Mounjaro in England, but experts warn eligibility still tightly restricted. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cddn399l4r9o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cddn399l4r9o#0 Tue, 24 Feb 2026 01:04:42 GMT
Trump's new tariff comes into effect at lower than expected rateThe global levy comes in at 10%, lower than the rate the president had threatened at the weekend. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cd6zn3ly22yo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cd6zn3ly22yo#0 Tue, 24 Feb 2026 08:08:06 GMT
Lib Dems to push for release of files on Andrew trade roleThe party wants documents on the former prince's appointment in 2001 to be published by ministers. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cqxdg01w4rno?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cqxdg01w4rno#0 Tue, 24 Feb 2026 08:43:15 GMT
Mexico sends thousands of soldiers to stop violence after death of drug lordA wave of violence has erupted across Mexico since a powerful drug cartel boss died following his capture by special forces. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cx2lp7xwql4o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cx2lp7xwql4o#0 Mon, 23 Feb 2026 21:12:47 GMT
